title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners:
Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Massive Restaurants South Asia Partners!
